end,function(s,v)local f=k(v)local L=function(L,O,a,X)return u(s,{L,O,a,X},v,f)end return L end,function(s,v)local f=k(v)local L=function(L,O,a,X,o,N,B)return u(s,{L;O,a;X,o;N,B},v,f)end return L end,{}return(F(1931277-854974,{}))(f(o))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[v(311769+-293131)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
